nodes.name: pyproject.toml
nodes.summary: Project build configuration for migration-oracle using hatchling, declaring 13 runtime dependencies (neo4j, pydantic, httpx, langchain, etc.), 4 dev dependencies, and two CLI entry points for the migration pipeline.

nodes.name: run_003b_verification.py
nodes.summary: Multi-level verification script for the 003b extractor improvements spec, testing extractor imports, CLI flags, logic correctness, and live HTTP extraction.

nodes.name: run_raw_extractions.sh
nodes.summary: Shell script that runs raw-only extraction for Angular, Spring Boot, and twelve WildFly major version hops using the migration-oracle CLI.

nodes.name: split_wildfly_raw.py
nodes.summary: Utility script that splits a multi-hop WildFly raw Markdown artifact into per-major-version-range files.

nodes.name: parse_hops
nodes.summary: Parses a multi-hop WildFly Markdown file and returns a list of (from_version, to_version, section_body) tuples.

nodes.name: main
nodes.summary: Entry point that reads the combined WildFly source file, groups hops into major-version ranges, and writes one output Markdown file per range.

nodes.name: changelog-migration-extractor.skill
nodes.summary: Binary ZIP-packaged AI skill for extracting migration-impacting changes from framework changelog documents.

nodes.name: migration-filter.skill
nodes.summary: Binary ZIP-packaged AI skill for filtering, deduplicating, and categorizing raw migration change records.

nodes.name: speckit-sdd-buddy.skill
nodes.summary: Binary ZIP-packaged AI skill for Spec Kit SDD buddy assistance during software design document authoring.

nodes.name: verification-protocol-writer.skill
nodes.summary: Binary ZIP-packaged AI skill for writing structured verification protocol documents from feature specs.

nodes.name: __init__.py
nodes.summary: Empty package initializer making test_000_foundations a Python package discoverable by pytest.

nodes.name: test_driver.py
nodes.summary: Pytest test suite verifying the Neo4j driver singleton lifecycle: get_driver() returns the same instance, close_driver() resets the singleton.

nodes.name: conftest.py
nodes.summary: Pytest conftest providing the anyio_backend fixture set to asyncio for all async extractor tests.

nodes.name: 003-framework-http-extractors.md
nodes.summary: Boundary contract document for the framework HTTP extractor subsystem, defining 6 rules including the public extract() interface and no circular imports.

nodes.name: CLAUDE.md
nodes.summary: Coding agent context file that instructs Claude Code to read the feature plan at specs/003-framework-http-extractors/plan.md for project structure and technology context.
